_description: Third eval set, designed to test the hypothesis that retrieval quality is content-dependent: simpler factual content (Wikipedia) should give higher recall than dense academic papers. All questions are in English. Source PDF: data/pdfs/Radamel_Falcao.pdf (English Wikipedia article on Radamel Falcao).

questions.question: What was the transfer fee paid by Atlético Madrid for Falcao?
How much did Monaco pay to sign Falcao in 2013?
Which two Premier League clubs did Falcao play for on loan?
Which Colombian club did Falcao debut professionally with?
Which individual award did Falcao win in 2012?
What injury kept Falcao out for six months at Monaco?
questions.reference: an ACL injury ruled him out for six months

questions.question: At what age did Falcao make his professional debut?
Which Turkish club did Falcao join in 2019?
What treble did Falcao win with Porto in 2011?
questions.reference: UEFA Europa League, Taça de Portugal and Primeira Liga treble

questions.question: How many goals did Falcao score in his record-breaking European campaign?
questions.reference: most goals (17) in a European campaign

questions.question: Which FIFA World Cup did Falcao miss due to injury?
questions.reference: missed the 2014 FIFA World Cup through injury

questions.question: What goalscoring record does Falcao hold for the Colombia national team?
questions.reference: top goalscorer for the Colombia national team
